available_hooks.label: Open safe mode
available_hooks.notes: Disables extensions, auto-rejoin, and heavy background services while preserving local editing and diagnostics.

available_hooks.label: Open without restore
available_hooks.notes: Starts cleanly without replaying the crashed session and keeps crash evidence available for export.

available_hooks.label: Export evidence
available_hooks.notes: Exports the incident trail and manifest refs without embedding raw dump bytes by default.

available_hooks.label: Retry one lane
available_hooks.notes: Retries only the affected fault domain; no global reset or hidden rerun is implied.
